name: ascii-trail-reveal
title: ASCII Trail Reveal
description: An authored S-curve sweeps through a deterministic ASCII grid, flipping cells away to reveal a labeled panel.
evidence: Wave H U24 ascii-trail-reveal design research unit

variables.label: Panel label
variables.description: Text shown on the revealed panel.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by the trail and revealed panel.

variables.label: Trail width
variables.description: Width of the cell reveal tail around the authored path.
